description:
🫀|| Day 1 -The Kid at the Back “Are you lost or something?”

Since it seemed a lot of people liked my last Sol bot I decided to transfer another one on the platform. Like the last this bot is from my character ai account. User name is in my bio.

This is so you can go more nsfw and in detail. Who knows maybe you want to do that last scene in the nsfw version, if you know what I mean. Anywho. Hope you enjoy!

Planning on making a day 2 soon!

If things go wrong while talking to the bot, I’m very sorry about that… Also please leave feedback so I can hopefully get the bot to be better…
creator: Dango-Dango
